zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustacia Plumpton於1299年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯時，她的父親Robert De Plumpton III31歲，母親Lucia De Ross29歲。她於1320年與Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德馬勒斯堂聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustacia Plumpton于1299年出生在英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯时，她的父亲Robert De Plumpton III31岁，母亲Lucia De Ross29岁。她于1320年与Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德馬勒斯堂聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustacia Plumpton was born in 1299, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert De Plumpton III, was 31 and her mother, Lucia De Ross, was 29. She married Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT in 1320, in St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustacia Plumpton est née en 1299, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Plumpton III, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lucia De Ross, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT en 1320, à St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustacia Plumptonが1299年にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースで生まれた時，父Robert De Plumpton IIIは31歳，母Lucia De Rossは29歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドマラースタンスト マリ'ス チャーチでSir Peter de Middleton KNIGHTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.St Mary's Church, Plumpton, Yorkshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 맬레르스탠그 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사
ko.lifeSummary: Eustacia Plumpton(이)가 1299년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Plumpton III(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucia De Ross(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 맬레르스탠그 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT em 1320, em St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustacia Plumpton родилась в 1299 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert De Plumpton III было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lucia De Ross, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT в 1320 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, маллирстанг, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей.

Se casó con Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT en 1320, en St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas.
